Questions track *evolving understanding* — things we're still figuring out, contradictions between sources, or frequently asked questions with nuanced answers.

Each question page follows the template in [[../../CLAUDE|CLAUDE.md]] and includes a **Status:** line (open | partially-answered | resolved).
